title: cyclosorus subpectinatus
intro: Cyclosorus subpectinatus, also known as the Chinese brake fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Blechnaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough, and soothing digestive issues. Cyclosorus subpectinatus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
